title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at PC Jeweller

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at PC Jeweller
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, PC Jeweller in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About PC Jeweller:
PC Jeweller is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller!
